title: erysimum baeticum
intro: Erysimum baeticum, also known as Baetic Wallflower, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erysimum baeticum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant effects. Erysimum baeticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for various uses in traditional medicine.
